---
name: Skill Template
description: Use this template to create new skills with a consistent structure.
version: 1.0
---

# Skill Name

## Purpose

- What this skill is for and why it matters.

## Structure

- Required or recommended format, referencing templates if relevant.

## Guidelines

- General rules for applying the skill.

## Best Practices

- Recommended approaches for best results.

## Do’s and Don’ts

- Quick, actionable advice (bullets).

## How to Use

- When and how to apply this skill.

## Example

- Concrete example(s) showing the skill in action.
